ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist creates */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the artist */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* A JSON string containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "total_followers" INTEGER /* The number of followers the artist has on the platform */,
  "total_streams" TEXT /* The total number of streams for the artist's songs */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the artist is currently active */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date the artist's account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has a premium account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  "total_playlists" INTEGER /* The total number of playlists created by the user */,
  "total_followers" INTEGER /* The number of followers the user has */,
  "total_following" INTEGER /* The number of artists or users the user is following */,
  "total_streams" TEXT /* The total number of streams by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is public or private */,
  "total_songs" INTEGER /* The total number of songs in the playlist */,
  "total_followers" INTEGER /* The number of followers the playlist has */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the playlist was updated */,
  "is_collaborative" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is collaborative (multiple users can add songs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* The date the album was released */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* The total number of tracks on the album */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* A measure of the album's popularity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "added_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who added the song to the playlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* The date the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_added_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("added_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who gave the rating */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* The rating given (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* A review or comment from the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* The date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follows" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is following */,
  "following_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user or artist being followed */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* The date the follow action was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id", "following_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended song */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* The recommendation algorithm used */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* The date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
